ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., regatta, race, championship) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* The organization or entity organizing the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website for the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the competition */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the participant is in */,
  "sail_number" INTEGER /* Sail number of the participant's boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant's boat */,
  "skipper" TEXT /* Name of the skipper */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat */,
  "crew_members" TEXT /* A list of crew members (if applicable) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the participant registered for the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "finish_order" INTEGER /* Finish order of the participant */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "adjustments" TEXT /* Any adjustments made to the result (e.g., penalties, disqualifications) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the participant */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* The number of the race within the competition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The average wind speed during the race */,
  "current_conditions" TEXT /* The current water conditions */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the race */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the finish line */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the finish line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailors" (
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sailor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sailor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sailor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sailor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the sailor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sailor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the sailor */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the sailor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the sailor's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the sailor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "sail_number" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the boat */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of boat (e.g., monohull, catamaran) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the boat in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the boat in meters */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the boat was built */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the boat */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sailing_history" (
  "sailing_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sailing history entry */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the competition took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the sailor in the competition */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* The number of the race within the competition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The average wind speed during the race */,
  "current_conditions" TEXT /* The current water conditions */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the race */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the finish line */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the finish line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sailing_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailing_history_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sailing_history_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., finish time, points) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* The number of the race within the competition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The average wind speed during the race */,
  "current_conditions" TEXT /* The current water conditions */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the race */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the finish line */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the finish line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement (e.g., championship winner, top 3 finisher) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the achievement took place */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* The number of the race within the competition */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* The average wind speed during the race */,
  "current_conditions" TEXT /* The current water conditions */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the race */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the finish line */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the finish line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, judge, sailor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., annual, lifetime) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the membership expires */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date the membership was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membership_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "sailor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sailor */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* A reference number for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_sailor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sailor_id") REFERENCES sailors ("sailor_id")
)
